{{Quote|Engines idling.|Republic Scout Frigate Captain|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
Republic '''Scouts''' were aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] for naval operations and made up the bulk of its aquatic navy. The successor to the "Light Scout", they were later upgraded to the faster and more heavily armed, "Advanced Scout".

{{Veh-stub}}
